classes.name: Marine
classes.description: Heavily armed fighter specializing in suppressing enemies and breaking through ambushes. Best choice for the front line.

classes.name: Engineer
classes.description: Technology specialist who can hack doors, repair life support systems, and activate Archon artifacts. Critically important for survival.

classes.name: Scout
classes.description: Fast and stealthy scout. Spots threats early, finds hidden paths, and bypasses enemy patrols.
